mapper.sql: id, model_type, model_name, sort, version, model_path, update_time, `type`
mapper.insert: insert into model_table (id, model_type, model_name, sort, version, model_path, update_time, `type`) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{model_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{model_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{model_path,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into model_table
id,
model_type,
model_name,
sort,
version,
model_path,
update_time,
`type`,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{model_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{model_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sort,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{model_path,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update model_table
model_type = #{model_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_name = #{model_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_path = #{model_path,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update model_table set model_type = #{model_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_name = #{model_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_path = #{model_path,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
